quotes.text: This meeting could have been an email. That email could have been a Slack message. That Slack message could have been nothing.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text: Inbox Zero is a lie. The goal isn't zero emails. It's zero emails that matter.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Email marketing: because you need a way to annoy people who already told you they're not interested.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best time to build an email list was before you launched. The second best time is now. The worst time is never.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best time to start building an email list is before you have a product. The second best is now.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Your first 1000 email subscribers are the hardest to get. The next 9,000 are easier. Start collecting.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Your onboarding email sequence should feel like a helpful friend, not a desperate salesperson.
quotes.author: based
